nodes.context: Football hooligan firm associated with Birmingham City FC, formed in 1982 from amalgamation of other firms including Apex.
Birmingham City hooligan firm that amalgamated to form the Zulu Warriors.
Offshoot gang created from the Zulu Warriors.
Offshoot gang created from the Zulu Warriors.
West Ham United hooligan firm, featured in film Green Street as Green Street Elite.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors were formed in 1982 out of an amalgamation of other Birmingham City firms including Apex.
edges.context: Zulu Warriors formed from amalgamation of Apex and other firms.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys
edges.context: Brew Crew is an offshoot gang of the Zulu Warriors.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys
edges.context: Junior Business Boys is an offshoot gang of the Zulu Warriors.

edges.evidence_quote: The match shown in the film is supposedly between West Ham United F.C. and Birmingham City with a fight after the match between the Zulu Warriors and the Green Street Elite (GSE), the name used in the film for the Inter City Firm (ICF).
edges.context: In the film Green Street, the Zulu Warriors fight the fictional Green Street Elite, which represents the Inter City Firm.
